tips_en: Start with Paper 1 (HyDRA) as its hybrid memory paradigm for spatiotemporal consistency provides foundational concepts that connect to Paper 3's dual-cache memory mechanism—both address maintaining visual coherence during generation. Paper 2 on facial expression editing complements these video generation approaches, offering insights into fine-grained control that could enhance character-focused video generation.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读第一篇论文(HyDRA)，因为其在视频生成中的时空一致性混合记忆范式为第三篇论文的双缓存记忆机制奠定了基础——两篇都涉及生成过程中的视觉一致性保持。第二篇关于面部表情编辑的论文则作为补充，提供了精细化控制的相关思路，可为角色相关视频生成提供参考。
